name: Firecrawl
one_liner: Web scraping and crawling API that turns websites into clean, LLM-ready markdown, HTML, or structured JSON via scrape, crawl, map, search, and extract endpoints.
access_notes: Free plan grants 1,000 credits/month with no card and no approval; sign up and get an fc- API key instantly. Paid plans (Hobby $16/mo through Scale $599/mo, plus Enterprise) add higher credit volume and rate limits. Firecrawl is also open-source and self-hostable.
api_notes: REST API with a handful of core endpoints: scrape (single page), crawl (recursive site), map (URL discovery), search (web search with content), extract (structured/AI extraction), plus agent and browser-sandbox/interact features. Official SDKs for Python, Node, Go, Rust. Bearer token auth via Authorization header. Powerful but a small endpoint count.
mcp_notes: Vendor ships the official firecrawl-mcp-server (github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server), installable via `npx -y firecrawl-mcp` with FIRECRAWL_API_KEY. Exposes tools like firecrawl_scrape, firecrawl_search, firecrawl_crawl, firecrawl_map, firecrawl_extract, firecrawl_interact, firecrawl_agent.
main_blocker: None significant; free self-serve API key available instantly, though free tier is credit-limited (1,000/month) and heavy use requires a paid plan.

evidence.claim: Firecrawl offers scrape, search, crawl, map, extract, agent, and browser-sandbox endpoints with LLM-ready markdown/HTML/JSON output and API-key (Bearer fc-) auth plus webhooks for async delivery.
Free plan provides 1,000 credits/month with no cost and no card; paid plans range Hobby $16/mo to Scale $599/mo plus Enterprise.
The official Firecrawl MCP server is shipped by the vendor, installed via `npx -y firecrawl-mcp` with FIRECRAWL_API_KEY.

open_questions: Exact rate limits per plan tier; full parameter breadth of the extract/agent endpoints.
